title: Enterprise SDD Module/Extension Governance Policy
description: Declarative governance policy for SDD modules, skills, and extensions. Wave 26 §25 #1 — convergence of Spec Kit #2559 (Agent Governance extension) and APM #1290 (ternary policy inheritance). Ternary semantics for `allow`/`deny` lists per category: field absent or `null` → inherit verbatim from parent; `[]` (empty list) → explicit override (block parent's set for that category); `[items]` → explicit list (intersect with parent allowlist, union with parent denylist). Tighten-only invariant: a child policy may only narrow what its parent allows; it can never widen beyond the parent.

extends.description: Optional path (relative to this file) or URL of a parent policy to inherit from. Cycle detection capped at depth 8.

fetch_failure_default.description: Behaviour when a parent policy in `extends` cannot be read. `block` = fail-closed (default); `warn` = log and continue with this policy as the root.

modules.description: Allow/deny lists for module ids. Ternary semantics apply — see top-level description.

capabilities.description: Capability deny-list. A capability listed here causes any module/skill/extension declaring it in its manifest to be refused, regardless of allowlist match.
